evidence.rule_anchor: content diversity — female historical representation per era
evidence.remediation: Enrich ERA_MAIN key_figures with female historical figures (e.g., Trần: An Tư Công Chúa, Nguyên Phi Ỷ Lan; Nguyễn: Hồ Xuân Hương, Đoàn Thị Điểm). Content owner decision, defer to next content round.
